channel.title: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament
channel.description: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament

item.title: Opinion Poll by Market for ÖSTERREICH, 20–21 April 2026 – Seating Plan Projection
item.description:
Seating plan projection for the European Parliament
11 seats needed for a majority
Opinion poll by Market for ÖSTERREICH, 20–21 April 2026
Details on https://filipvanlaenen.github.io/austrian_ep_polls/2026-04-21-Market.html
